confirm.title: Order request

confirm.confirmError: Could not confirm. Please try again.
confirm.rejectError: Could not process the rejection. Please try again.

confirmBooking.approveError: Could not approve. Please try again.
confirmBooking.rejectError: Could not process the rejection. Please try again.

orderConfirmed.message: Your order was placed successfully. We'll be in touch shortly.
